findings.description: RewindDialog component provides modal with three rewind modes: 'Code & Conversation', 'Conversation only', and 'Code only'. Shows checkpoint turn number, preview of changes (loading state + diff summary), and confirm/cancel buttons.
findings.evidence: RewindDialog.tsx: three RewindMode options, checkpoint.turnIndex display, preview loading state, onRewind/onCancel callbacks

findings.description: CheckpointTimeline component renders vertical timeline with dots, lines, turn numbers, timestamps, file change summaries (created/modified/deleted counts), and rewind buttons per checkpoint
findings.evidence: CheckpointTimeline.tsx: timeline-dot, timeline-line elements, fileActionSummary helper, checkpoint-toggle expandable, onRewind and onViewLatestChanges callbacks

findings.description: Checkpoint hook (useCheckpoints) manages checkpoint state with tests
Cannot verify live checkpoint timeline or rewind dialog in conversation view due to conversation crash issue
